eventSummary:
The Qilin Ransomware group has listed Kuzco Lighting and Artemedica as its latest victims on its dark web leak portal.
Sources:
- https://bsky.app/profile/falconfeedsio.bsky.social/post/3mgim7l6tj22l

A new ClickFix malware campaign is targeting users by tricking them into executing malicious PowerShell commands via Windows Terminal to deploy Lumma Stealer, a credential-harvesting malware.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/1665789406026842112/status/2030342767491129671

An autonomous open-source AI tool named CyberStrikeAI has reportedly breached over 600 Fortinet firewalls across 55 countries by automating the entire attack chain including reconnaissance and exploitation.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/1945909917031731200/status/2030325397850886403

Iran-linked hackers are targeting IP cameras across Israel and Gulf states to gather military intelligence and conduct shadow cyber operations amid reports of escalating regional conflict and missile attacks.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/128484298/status/2030287510262174021
- https://twitter.com/128484298/status/2030297929378943394
- https://twitter.com/4592195181/status/2030449535156191343
